summary: Polyamorous relationship management app with support for multiple partners and pet care/emotional support features focused on the woman's needs
architectural_notes: Partner invitation system will replace existing add/edit partner forms - partners join via invitation links instead of manual entry
User accounts required for partners - each partner creates individual account when accepting invitation
Implementation priority order: 1) Invitation links, 2) Messaging, 3) Daily hearts with streaks, 4) Zoom link management

existing_features.title: Build a dashboard interface displaying all partners in the relationship with their profiles and connection status
Create a pet care section showing pet profiles with care schedules and emotional support tracking focused on the woman's wellbeing
Implement forms for adding and editing partner information with validation
Implement forms for adding and editing pet profiles with care schedule management
Design a warm, nurturing visual theme with soft colors and compassionate typography that emphasizes care, connection, and emotional wellbeing throughout the interface
Create frontend component to display and copy invitation links for sharing with partners
Replace the AddPartnerModal and PartnerForm components with the new invitation link generation interface in the Dashboard
Create frontend signup flow that accepts invitation codes as URL parameters and automatically joins partners to relationships after Internet Identity authentication
Add React Query hooks for invitation link generation and validation operations with proper cache invalidation

new_feature_requests.summary: Support multiple partners in polyamorous relationship structure
Include pet profiles for care tracking and emotional support
Focus features on woman's emotional support and care needs
Create a data model to store and manage multiple partner profiles within a single relationship structure, including fields for name, relationship type, and connection date
Create a data model for pet profiles including name, type, care schedule, and emotional support notes
Generate unique invitation links that partners can use to create individual accounts and join the relationship
Implement one-on-one and group messaging system between primary user and all partners
Create daily hearts feature with manual sending and consecutive day streak tracking
Add Zoom meeting link storage and display for individual partners and groups with meeting codes
Create a backend data structure to store invitation codes with metadata including code string, expiration timestamp, relationship ID, creator principal, and used status
Implement backend function to generate unique invitation links that return a shareable code string for partners to use when creating their accounts
Implement backend function to validate invitation codes and automatically add partners to relationships when they sign up using valid invitation links
